title: oestlundia cyanocolumna
intro: Oestlundia cyanocolumna, also known as the cyan column orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oestlundia cyanocolumna include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying the leaves and roots, and then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes.
